raids.name: Salvations Edge
raids.description: Fight the witness at the heart of his monolith, at the epicentre of the Pale Heart. Stop it from enacting its final shape, bringing to a close the saga of Light and Dark

raids.name: Desert Perpetual
raids.description: Stop The Conductors vex from digitizing the singularity at the heart of Kepler and journey into a microcosm of the realm of The Nine

raids.name: Crota`s End
raids.description: Journey into the pit, where crota`s soul sleeps and slay the son of oryx, avenging Eris Morns lost fireteam

raids.name: Root of Nighmares
raids.description: The Witness has begun his machinations in the Pale Heart of the traveller. But in the wake of the attempt to stop it, the traveller unwittingly rose a powerful disciple from the dead. Raid the Witnesses pyramid ship, fight the shadow legion and put down the disciple, once and for all

raids.name: Kings Fall
raids.description: The God King of the Hive has fled into his throne world; he must be pursued. Fight your way into this throne world, defeat his monsters, and slay the Taken King once and for all

raids.name: Vow Of The Disciple
raids.description: Bogged down in Savathun`s Throne World; Rhulk, First Disciple of the Witness awaits your arrival. He sees us as entertainment, an annoyance, bugs beneath his heel. Prove him wrong, slay him in his home and deal The Witness a first blow

raids.name: Deep Stone Crypt
raids.description: Lieutenants of House Salvation have infiltrated Clovis Brays dormant Exo-Human facility, and plan to use the technology therein to further their agenda. Follow them, and purge the crypt of their presence

raids.name: Garden of Salvation
raids.description: Evil stirs once more in the Black Garden and an unknown signal from deep within beckons you forth. Step once more into the Garden, fight your way through the Vex and find the signals origin

raids.name: Last Wish
raids.description: Riven of a Thousand Voices. The Architect behind the fall of Cayde-6 and the curse that now haunts the Dreaming City, must be slain. Travel deep into the home of the Awoken people, and seal the fate of the Ahamkara`s

raids.name: Vault of Glass
raids.description: Beneath Venus, evil stirs. Fight your way into the Vault of Glass, a timeless space where the Vex manipulate and weave time to their own end. Put a stop to its activity and deal the Vex a major blow in the Sol System
